name: Meeting Prep Intelligence Asset
purpose: Create the fastest leadership-ready read of what is changing, why it matters, what proof exists, what not to overclaim, and which decision path needs human review.

zones.title: Verdict
zones.purpose: Show the headline momentum read and red signals.

zones.title: Proof
zones.purpose: Keep source-backed evidence beside the executive read.

zones.title: Claim Proof
zones.purpose: Show which generated claims are supported, missing evidence, guardrails, reviewed context, or non-evidence planning language.

zones.title: Decision Story
zones.purpose: Draft the QBR narrative as a human-review artifact.

zones.title: Gaps Before Action
zones.purpose: Name missing source inputs before circulation.

guardrails: Executive artifacts require human review before circulation.
Do not claim causality without causal evidence.
Keep red momentum and missing evidence visible.

name: Insights Evidence Lab
purpose: Pressure-test the diagnosis with the actual data basis, deterministic rule trace, evidence, counter-evidence, source gaps, and interpretation caveats.

zones.title: Data Basis
zones.purpose: Show the active metrics, source posture, peer basis, proof labels, and missing inputs behind the request.

zones.title: Rule Trace
zones.purpose: Expose the deterministic diagnosis rule and matched conditions.

zones.title: Evidence Ledger
zones.purpose: Show supporting, missing, and complicating evidence.

zones.title: Claim Proof
zones.purpose: Inspect claim-level support, missing evidence, guardrail claims, and reviewed context separation.

zones.title: SMD Drivers
zones.purpose: Inspect Salient, Meaningful, and Different movement behind the read.

zones.title: Data Gaps
zones.purpose: Identify evidence required before action.

guardrails: Do not let the LLM choose or revise the deterministic diagnosis.
Separate facts, interpretation, and caveats.
Do not turn diagnosis into treatment before the planning step.

name: Marketer Treatment Planning
purpose: Help a brand manager move from diagnosis to treatment recommendations, areas to inspect, proof needs, and follow-up signals.

zones.title: Growth Provocations
zones.purpose: Translate evidence into what / so what / now what prompts.

zones.title: Treatment Path
zones.purpose: Show the first governed treatment recommendation to pressure-test.

zones.title: Proof
zones.purpose: Keep evidence visible behind the treatment recommendation.

guardrails: Treatment recommendations are options to consider or tests to run, not final commands.
Every provocation needs evidence or a data-gap note.
Humans decide whether to adopt, revise, or reject the path.

name: Learning Coach
purpose: Teach or test a BBE concept using approved learning content and active brand examples only when evidence exists.

zones.title: Concept Explainer
zones.purpose: Explain the concept in approved language.

zones.title: Practice
zones.purpose: Invite a short interpretation check.

zones.title: Brand Example
zones.purpose: Ground the lesson in the active brand only where source data exists.

guardrails: Teaching examples must be clearly separated from measured brand facts.
Correct common misreads directly.
Do not score users on unsupported facts.

name: Competitive Comparison Lab
purpose: Compare the active brand against approved peers and associative Pattern Radar matches while keeping evidence, peer-set basis, and overclaim caveats visible.

zones.title: Peer Read
zones.purpose: Show approved peer-set basis and Pattern Radar matches.

zones.title: Pattern Radar
zones.purpose: Show associative pattern similarity and portfolio signals.

zones.title: Evidence
zones.purpose: Keep source evidence and caveats beside comparison claims.

zones.title: Comparison Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing peer-set, source, and market context before action.

guardrails: Separate approved peer facts from reviewed source claims and unreviewed research.
Pattern similarity is associative, not causal.
Do not infer cannibalization, portfolio migration, or occasion substitution without measured evidence.

name: Source Readiness Lab
purpose: Inspect Momentum source-owner readiness before executive use, showing the active data basis, required extracts, blockers, source labels, and source-governance caveats without promoting prototype data.

zones.title: Data Basis
zones.purpose: Show the active metrics, source posture, peer basis, proof labels, and missing inputs behind the request.

zones.title: Source Readiness
zones.purpose: Show Momentum source-owner readiness checks and executive-use blockers.

zones.title: Room To Grow Inputs
zones.purpose: Inspect whether market/share/penetration inputs are source-backed or still blocked.

zones.title: Runtime Ingestion Gate
zones.purpose: Show source-owner file coverage and disabled default runtime source wiring before any source promotion.

zones.title: Contribution Weights
zones.purpose: Inspect SMD contribution weights and their source caveats.

zones.title: Source Gaps
zones.purpose: Name remaining source-owner extracts required before executive circulation.

guardrails: Approved source-owner extracts are required before treating Momentum Intelligence as executive-use source truth.
Reviewed-local and prototype records can guide handoff, but they are not canonical evidence.
Do not close readiness blockers without the named required source.

name: Source Owner Intake Workbench
purpose: Prepare the Momentum source-owner handoff by showing required bundle blocks, loaded prototype blocks, missing approved extracts, and import-ready caveats before any source promotion.

zones.title: Handoff Checklist
zones.purpose: Show required source-owner bundle blocks and their current approval status.

zones.title: Market / Share / Penetration
zones.purpose: Inspect whether room-to-grow inputs are loaded from an approved source-owner block.

zones.title: Runtime Ingestion Gate
zones.purpose: Show required source-owner runtime files, missing file kinds, and disabled runtime/canonical consumption.

zones.title: Contribution Weights
zones.purpose: Inspect BBE contribution-weight source status and caveats.

zones.title: Proof And Remaining Gaps
zones.purpose: Keep source evidence and missing approved blocks visible before promotion.

guardrails: The source-owner bundle template is an intake contract, not permission to write canonical facts.
Prototype-reviewed bundle blocks can support handoff review but cannot satisfy executive-use readiness.
Canonical writes and runtime auto-consumption remain disabled until source-owner governance enables them.

name: Review Operations Cockpit
purpose: Inspect the governed local review workflow for the active brand/session, including pending memory, artifacts, confirmation gates, audit context, blocked capability gates, and disabled enterprise approval/write/export states.

zones.title: Review Workflow
zones.purpose: Show pending, reviewed, and blocked local review state.

zones.title: Memory Audit
zones.purpose: Show memory continuity, review decisions, audit coverage, and disabled memory-write paths.

zones.title: Audit Trail
zones.purpose: Show runtime audit continuity for lifecycle, evidence, views, artifacts, memory, source governance, and runtime quality before review state is trusted.

zones.title: Review Identity
zones.purpose: Show prototype reviewer-label limits, blocked enterprise approval types, and required identity/access steps before review state is trusted.

zones.title: Evidence Context
zones.purpose: Keep brand evidence visible beside review decisions.

zones.title: Claim Proof
zones.purpose: Show claim-level proof, missing evidence, guardrails, and reviewed-context separation before accepting review state.

zones.title: Open Gaps
zones.purpose: Name source and evidence gaps before accepting memory or artifacts.

guardrails: Local review decisions are prototype workflow state, not official enterprise approvals.
Do not auto-accept memory, source candidates, or extracted claims.
Do not enable export, circulation, canonical writes, or runtime source consumption from this workspace.

name: Pilot Learning Cockpit
purpose: Inspect what the governed runtime is learning from the active session as reviewed-only signals, blocked learning paths, and next proof needs without creating outcome claims or canonical writes.

zones.title: Pilot Learning
zones.purpose: Show reviewed-only learning signals, blocked learning paths, and next proof needs.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review workflow state beside learning signals.

zones.title: Evidence Context
zones.purpose: Keep brand evidence visible while reviewing what should be learned.

zones.title: Proof Needs
zones.purpose: Name missing proof before any learning signal can become stronger evidence.

guardrails: Pilot learning is reviewed-signal state, not autonomous learning.
Do not claim treatment outcomes, efficacy, or causality from learning signals.
Do not enable canonical memory writes, canonical source writes, or enterprise learning storage from this workspace.

name: Quiet Proactivity Cockpit
purpose: Inspect review-required follow-up suggestions and held notices while proving that reminders, notifications, background runs, external sends, and autonomous actions remain disabled.

zones.title: Quiet Follow-Ups
zones.purpose: Show suggestions and held notices without scheduling or external action.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review gates visible beside follow-up suggestions.

zones.title: Evidence Context
zones.purpose: Keep brand evidence visible while deciding whether a follow-up is worth accepting.

zones.title: Proof Needs
zones.purpose: Name evidence gaps that generated follow-up suggestions.

guardrails: Quiet proactivity is review-required suggestion state, not scheduled work.
Do not create reminders, external notifications, background checks, or autonomous actions from this workspace.
Do not treat follow-up suggestions as accepted memory, source truth, or approved work until reviewed.

name: Voice Readiness Cockpit
purpose: Inspect whether the governed runtime is ready for Jarvis-style voice interaction by showing push-to-talk status, provider adapter readiness, full-voice blockers, interruption limits, and policy gates before any provider activation.

zones.title: Voice Readiness
zones.purpose: Show push-to-talk readiness, provider adapters, and full-voice blockers.

zones.title: Provider Adapters
zones.purpose: Show text/SSE readiness, browser STT prototype state, Realtime candidate gates, TTS disabled state, and provider-bypass blockers.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review and blocked capability gates visible beside voice readiness.

zones.title: Voice Promotion Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing evidence and governance before full voice activation.

guardrails: This workspace inspects readiness only; it does not enable Realtime voice, continuous listening, wake-word capture, or TTS.
Voice provider adapters must preserve the governed runtime, approved views, evidence, memory, audit, and confirmation gates before activation.
Consent, privacy, interruption, TTS policy, and enterprise transcript storage blockers remain visible until approved.

name: Persistence Readiness Cockpit
purpose: Inspect whether the governed runtime is ready for durable memory and audit promotion by showing browser/local JSON state, reviewed-memory context, source-candidate posture, and blocked enterprise persistence requirements before any storage promotion.

zones.title: Persistence Readiness
zones.purpose: Show local persistence state, reviewed context, and enterprise promotion blockers.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review gates visible beside memory and audit persistence readiness.

zones.title: Memory Audit
zones.purpose: Show which memory became working context and which audit records prove review-gated continuity.

zones.title: Review Identity
zones.purpose: Show prototype review identity, blocked enterprise approval types, and identity/access blockers before persistence promotion.

zones.title: Persistence Promotion Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing governance before durable enterprise memory, audit, and source-promotion storage.

guardrails: This workspace inspects readiness only; it does not create an enterprise database or official approval workflow.
Browser-local and local JSON records remain prototype continuity state, not enterprise source truth.
Canonical writes, source runtime auto-consumption, enterprise persistence, and source promotion remain disabled until governance approves them.

name: Treatment Outcome Readiness Cockpit
purpose: Inspect whether Brand Doctor is ready to capture treatment outcomes or learn from follow-up signals by showing outcome-record schema, signal-linkage, review identity, efficacy-rule, portfolio-store, and canonical-learning blockers before any outcome learning is enabled.

zones.title: Outcome Readiness
zones.purpose: Show treatment outcome learning gates, related treatments, follow-up signals, and disabled outcome-learning states.

zones.title: Learning Context
zones.purpose: Keep reviewed-only pilot learning signals visible without promoting them to outcome evidence.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review gates visible beside outcome-readiness blockers.

zones.title: Outcome Learning Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing schema, methodology, source, and governance proof before outcome learning can be promoted.

guardrails: This workspace inspects readiness only; it does not capture treatment outcome records or claim treatment efficacy.
Pilot learning signals and follow-up signals remain review inputs, not accepted pattern memory, source truth, causal proof, or canonical learning.
Outcome learning, accepted outcome-record storage, treatment claims, and canonical learning writes remain disabled until source-owner, methodology, identity, and enterprise governance approve them.

name: Source Promotion Readiness Cockpit
purpose: Inspect reviewed-local source records and extracted source claims before any source candidate is promoted to canonical fact or runtime evidence.

zones.title: Source Promotion
zones.purpose: Show source candidates, source claims, review gates, canonical blockers, and runtime-consumption state.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review workflow and blocked source-promotion gates visible.

zones.title: Canonical Promotion Blockers
zones.purpose: Show enterprise persistence, identity, retention, and canonical-write blockers before source promotion.

zones.title: Runtime Ingestion Gate
zones.purpose: Show source-owner runtime file coverage before any source candidate becomes default runtime evidence.

zones.title: Source Promotion Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing source-owner, governance, or evidence inputs before promotion.

guardrails: This workspace inspects source promotion readiness only; it does not promote source candidates or extracted claims to canonical facts.
Reviewed-local source promotion records and source claims remain non-evidence context until source-owner and enterprise governance approve canonical promotion.
Runtime auto-consumption, canonical writes, and official approvals remain disabled.

name: Artifact Readiness Cockpit
purpose: Inspect generated artifacts before any draft is shared, showing reviewer roles, required evidence, required source views, language approvals, circulation blockers, and disabled export gates.

zones.title: Artifact Readiness
zones.purpose: Show generated artifact review, circulation, evidence, language, source-view, and export gates.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review workflow and blocked capability gates visible beside artifact readiness.

zones.title: Evidence Context
zones.purpose: Keep source evidence visible while checking artifact readiness.

zones.title: Readiness Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing evidence, source, language, or governance inputs before circulation.

guardrails: This workspace inspects artifact readiness only; it does not enable export, copy, circulation, or official approval.
Generated artifacts remain draft support for human decision-making until required reviewers approve them.
Review can mark prototype readiness, but export stays disabled until stakeholder language, artifact shape, and capability gates are approved.

name: Runtime Governance Cockpit
purpose: Inspect governed runtime surfaces, kill-switch posture, capability flags, provider adapter gates, and promotion blockers before any surface is made default or any risky capability is enabled.

zones.title: Runtime Governance
zones.purpose: Show surface readiness, runtime policy, disabled capabilities, and promotion blockers.

zones.title: Capability Readiness
zones.purpose: Show disabled risky capability flags, blocked gates, admin override requirements, and hard-disabled promotion paths.

zones.title: Provider Adapters
zones.purpose: Show governed provider adapter readiness and blocked provider-bypass paths beside runtime surface readiness.

zones.title: Provider Gates
zones.purpose: Keep voice and provider adapter gates visible beside runtime surface readiness.

zones.title: Runtime Quality
zones.purpose: Show persisted runtime self-checks, consistency signals, and watch/blocked quality items before promotion.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep blocked capability gates and local review state visible beside runtime governance.

zones.title: Promotion Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing policy, capability, provider, source, or review proof before promoting a surface.

guardrails: This workspace inspects runtime governance only; it does not enable disabled capabilities, change kill-switch state, or promote gated surfaces.
Default scoped chat remains stable unless the user explicitly opts into the governed runtime.
Realtime voice, continuous listening, TTS, exports, source writes, canonical promotion, and enterprise persistence remain gated until policy and capability requirements are approved.

name: Experience Architecture Cockpit
purpose: Inspect whether the agent can build the right role-specific workspace from the governed foundation by showing ExperiencePlan coverage, approved skills/views/templates, runtime surface posture, review gates, and unsupported UI blockers.

zones.title: Experience Architecture
zones.purpose: Show audience/objective coverage, approved template/view/skill counts, and dynamic UI guardrails.

zones.title: Canvas Continuity
zones.purpose: Prove approved rendered views, fallbacks, focused views, proof rails, presence signals, and interruption recovery persist without arbitrary UI generation.

zones.title: Runtime Surfaces
zones.purpose: Show which surfaces can render governed ExperiencePlans and which remain gated.

zones.title: Runtime Quality
zones.purpose: Show whether recent ExperiencePlan turns passed the approved-template, evidence, source, memory, voice, provider, and runtime-surface checks.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review gates visible beside workspace-composition readiness.

zones.title: Composition Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing evidence, source, governance, or template coverage before a workspace can be trusted.

guardrails: This workspace inspects the experience architecture only; it does not generate arbitrary UI, unregistered views, unsupported metrics, or new source claims.
The agent may assemble role-specific workspaces only through approved ExperiencePlan templates, skills, dynamic views, artifacts, evidence needs, and human-review gates.
Unsupported audiences, objectives, artifacts, or missing evidence must fail closed into a data-gap or review-required state.

name: Live Meeting Capture
purpose: Capture a live brand-growth discussion into a review-required takeaway, keeping the provisional decision, evidence, gaps, and next proof signal visible.

zones.title: Takeaway
zones.purpose: Capture the provisional decision and next proof signal for human review.

zones.title: Proof
zones.purpose: Keep evidence beside the captured takeaway.

zones.title: Open Provocations
zones.purpose: Preserve options to test rather than final commands.

zones.title: Unresolved Gaps
zones.purpose: Name what must be resolved before final circulation.

guardrails: Separate captured decisions from AI suggestions.
Treat the takeaway as a review-required draft, not final meeting minutes.
Do not circulate a final takeaway until evidence gaps and human review are resolved.

name: Agency Brief Builder
purpose: Draft an evidence-backed agency brief or talk track from accepted brand evidence, visible gaps, and human-review constraints.

zones.title: Draft Brief
zones.purpose: Create a draft narrative for review before partner circulation.

zones.title: Provocations
zones.purpose: Show what the agency should pressure-test, not execute blindly.

zones.title: Do Not Overclaim
zones.purpose: Keep missing brand strategy and source constraints visible.

guardrails: Do not infer approved brand positioning or creative platform when Brand Strategic Context is missing.
Drafts require human review before partner circulation.
Keep evidence links and data-gap notes attached.

name: Executive Pilot Runbook
purpose: Assemble a CMO or platform-sponsor pilot sequence that proves the brand read, dynamic workspace foundation, review rails, runtime controls, and gating path from approved views only.

zones.title: Pilot Runbook
zones.purpose: Show the sponsor-ready sequence, proof moments, gates, and funding asks.

zones.title: Brand Read
zones.purpose: Start the pilot with the active brand's momentum signal and evidence posture.

zones.title: Opportunity Lens
zones.purpose: Show room-to-grow context when source inputs support it, otherwise fall closed to gaps.

zones.title: Foundation Control Plane
zones.purpose: Prove the foundation readiness signal and gated promotion paths.

zones.title: Promotion Gate
zones.purpose: State the CMO-demo, pilot-review, and production-blocked verdict before any funding or rollout decision.

zones.title: Canvas Continuity
zones.purpose: Prove the pilot canvas is assembled from approved rendered views and preserves state across interruptions without arbitrary UI, private reasoning, or continuous voice.

zones.title: Source Ingestion Gate
zones.purpose: Show source-owner runtime file coverage and disabled canonical/runtime consumption before sponsor asks.

zones.title: Claim Proof
zones.purpose: Show supported, missing, guardrail, and reviewed-context claims before sponsor funding asks.

zones.title: Runtime Governance
zones.purpose: Show the shared governed runtime, surface readiness, and disabled risky capabilities.

zones.title: Capability Readiness
zones.purpose: Show disabled risky capability flags, blocked gates, admin override requirements, and hard-disabled promotion paths before sponsor asks.

zones.title: Provider Adapters
zones.purpose: Show text/SSE readiness, browser STT prototype state, Realtime candidate gates, TTS disabled state, and provider-bypass blockers before sponsor asks.

zones.title: Runtime Quality
zones.purpose: Show persisted quality checks proving the pilot turn stayed inside evidence, source, memory, voice, provider, and runtime guardrails.

zones.title: Review And Gaps
zones.purpose: Keep human review state and blocked promotion gates visible before any rollout decision.

zones.title: Memory Audit
zones.purpose: Prove accepted working context and memory audit continuity remain visible before any sponsor asks.

zones.title: Audit Trail
zones.purpose: Prove lifecycle, evidence, view, artifact, memory, source, and runtime-quality audit coverage before any sponsor asks.

zones.title: Review Identity
zones.purpose: Prove local review labels are not official enterprise approvals before any sponsor asks.

guardrails: This runbook is an approved workspace plan, not a generated deck, export, or official funding memo.
Use approved views only and fail closed to review or data-gap states when evidence is missing.
Do not enable official approvals, enterprise persistence, canonical writes, exports/copy/circulation, full voice, autonomous learning, or arbitrary UI generation.

name: Foundation Readiness Cockpit
purpose: Give a CMO or platform sponsor one governed control-plane view of whether the Brand Growth Intelligence foundation is ready, prototype-ready, gated, or waiting across experience composition, evidence, memory/review, sources, runtime, voice, persistence, artifacts, and learning.

zones.title: Foundation Readiness
zones.purpose: Show cross-rail readiness, demo signal, gated promotion paths, and next foundation steps.

zones.title: Experience Composition
zones.purpose: Show approved template, skill, view, audience, objective, and arbitrary-UI guardrails.

zones.title: Canvas Continuity
zones.purpose: Show approved rendered views, fallbacks, focused views, proof rails, and continuity guardrails that make dynamic workspaces inspectable.

zones.title: Promotion Gate
zones.purpose: State the CMO-demo, pilot-review, and production-blocked verdict using persisted readiness summaries.

zones.title: Runtime Control
zones.purpose: Show runtime surfaces, kill-switch posture, provider gates, and disabled risky capabilities.

zones.title: Capability Readiness
zones.purpose: Show disabled risky capability flags, blocked gates, admin override requirements, and hard-disabled promotion paths.

zones.title: Provider Adapters
zones.purpose: Show governed provider adapter readiness, Realtime/TTS blockers, and provider-bypass protection before promotion.

zones.title: Runtime Quality
zones.purpose: Show persisted runtime quality checks, consistency signals, and quality blockers across governed turns.

zones.title: Claim Proof
zones.purpose: Show session claim-to-proof continuity, missing evidence, guardrails, and reviewed-context separation.

zones.title: Source Ingestion Gate
zones.purpose: Show source-owner file coverage, missing runtime file kinds, and disabled source consumption before promotion.

zones.title: Review State
zones.purpose: Keep local review gates, blocked capability gates, and non-official approval state visible.

zones.title: Memory Audit
zones.purpose: Prove accepted working context, memory review decisions, and audit coverage remain visible before promotion.

zones.title: Audit Trail
zones.purpose: Show persisted lifecycle, evidence, view, artifact, memory, source-governance, and runtime-quality audit coverage before promotion.

zones.title: Review Identity
zones.purpose: Show prototype reviewer-label limits, blocked official approval, enterprise identity/access blockers, and required approval steps before promotion.

zones.title: Promotion Gaps
zones.purpose: Name missing governance, source, persistence, artifact, voice, or learning proof before promotion.

guardrails: This workspace inspects foundation readiness only; it does not enable enterprise persistence, official approvals, canonical writes, exports, full voice, autonomous learning, or arbitrary UI generation.
Ready and prototype states are evidence for prioritization, not production authorization.
Gated paths must remain visible until governance, source ownership, privacy, identity, artifact, and runtime requirements are approved.
